purpose: Полный контекст realty-portal mesh для нового CC чата в новом репо
first_actions: 2. Убедись что SSH tunnel up: curl http://localhost:8765/mail/health
4. Зарегистрируй себя в MCP как school-v4 (см. mcp_bootstrap_sequence ниже)

mcp_infrastructure.warning: project_key ВСЕГДА Linux-absolute path. Windows path = ошибка NEW-10

mcp_api_gotchas.mark_message_read: single int message_id (NOT array, NOT mark_read)
mcp_api_gotchas.contacts: request_contact + respond_contact both sides BEFORE send_message
mcp_api_gotchas.contact_policy: default = open (AP-7). Sensitive roles: call set_contact_policy restricted right after register

errors_and_deadends.title: register_agent default contact_policy = open
errors_and_deadends.detail: Any agent can send messages immediately after registration. Secretary and client-facing roles MUST call set_contact_policy restricted before any work.

errors_and_deadends.title: mark_message_read does not persist between fetch calls
errors_and_deadends.detail: read_at is set but next fetch_inbox shows messages as unread again. Hypothesis: WAL checkpoint race or lazy sync. Investigate: sqlite3 .schema messages + SELECT id,read_at FROM messages WHERE read_at IS NOT NULL.

errors_and_deadends.title: SSH heredoc + Python f-string = SyntaxError
errors_and_deadends.detail: Triple escaping through heredoc breaks Python f-strings on Aeza. Fix: write script to local file, scp to server, then execute. No multiline Python via SSH heredoc.

errors_and_deadends.title: Claude Code picks up wrong ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from env
errors_and_deadends.detail: If ANTHROPIC_API_KEY exists in env from another role, CC uses it. Before launching role with custom key: Remove-Item Env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in PowerShell.

errors_and_deadends.title: SSH -L tunnel drops more than 10 times per session
errors_and_deadends.detail: Each drop = MCP tools unavailable for all CC chats. Current mitigation: manual reconnect. Solution: Tailscale migration pending Ilya approval.

errors_and_deadends.title: MCP tools do not appear if session opened before tunnel up
errors_and_deadends.detail: CC registers MCP client at session start. If tunnel came up later, tools will not appear. Only fresh CC session after tunnel up resolves this.
errors_and_deadends.status: KNOWN, launcher preflight probe = v0.5 candidate

key_invariants: context_measurement_rule: never self-estimate, only Ilya UI
v05_candidates: rotation_protocol: exit_closure at >80% context, autolauncher reanimates
AP-6 fix: MCP silent degradation fallback
AP-7 fix: set_contact_policy explicit for sensitive roles
orchestrator_protocol: ACK files + status_log + watcher.ps1 contract

architecture_decisions.mcp_transport: localhost:8765 + SSH tunnel + bearer. No Caddy, no domain.
architecture_decisions.tailscale_status: PENDING Ilya approval. Replaces SSH -L tunnel. Cost $0 free tier.

scale_up_stages.stage1: autolauncher + Windows Terminal tabs + Tailscale (next session)
